findings.rationale: No cloud financial management impact. Change modifies Python project configuration in a governance framework repository. No cloud resources provisioned, no billing configurations altered, no unit economics impact.

No cloud resources introduced or modified. Addition of pytest-html dev dependency adds negligible CI overhead (<2s per test run) and <1MB disk per HTML report. No right-sizing or idle resource concerns.
No resources being decommissioned, shut down, or destroyed. No infrastructure lifecycle changes. No destruction candidates identified.
No cloud compute, storage, or network resources affected. No savings plan coverage changes. No commitment-based discount implications. Change is entirely within development tooling configuration.
No new resources requiring tagging or cost allocation. No impact to showback/chargeback models. No cost center mapping changes. No taggable resources in scope.
